outcome_contract.why: Standing data files are the input to every startup-loop stage decision. Without freshness enforcement, an agent or operator can make a strategy decision based on a 3-month-old offer doc without any warning.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Startup-baselines files have a freshness enforcement mechanism — stale files are surfaced automatically via a script or preflight check, so decisions are never silently made on outdated standing data.
